title: Our Inventory
description: It's not your diamond. It's our diamond. This mod removes the privilege of having a private inventory. Every single item in your inventory is now shared across all players on the server.
body:
It's not _your_ diamond. It's _our_ diamond.

**Our Inventory** does exactly what it says on the tin: it synchronizes the inventories, hotbars, and armor slots of all online players into one shared space.

When one player picks up an item, everyone gets it. When another player uses a tool, its durability drops for the entire server. This simple concept transforms Minecraft into a true cooperative or chaotic experience.

The mod respects the keepInventory gamerule, but for the ultimate challenge, try playing with it off. When one player eventually meets their end in the lava, the entire server's inventory burns with them. Also, good luck fighting over the hotbar slots.

Perfect for team-based challenges, building communities from scratch, or just seeing how long your friendships can last.

The mod is 100% server-side. Works on dedicated servers and in LAN games. No client mod is required for players to join. Also, there are no teams or setup requirements, everyone is equal. Just drop it in the mods folder and enjoy. ;)
